title: × dactylocamptis neglecta
intro: × Dactylocamptis neglecta, also known as the neglected spider orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to Europe. The plant contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins with reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Some studies suggest that the plant may have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of × Dactylocamptis neglecta are typically used in traditional medicine, often in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, but its use should be carefully evaluated under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
